name: shipkit-pipe
description: MVP to Production Pipeline — Connect your AI agent, CI/CD, security, and deploy. One command, any stack.
author: Sagar Giri <hello@sagargiri.com> (https://github.com/sagar-grv)

scripts.validate:templates: for f in template/agents/*.md template/docs/*.md template/github/*.yml template/github/workflows/*.yml template/husky/pre-commit; do test -f "$f" && echo "✓ $f" || { echo "✗ $f"; exit 1; }; done
